data.title: demo: Workers KV — hello world key/value store
data.description:
## Goal

Educational hello-world demo for Cloudflare Workers KV.

## What to implement

* Worker that on `GET /set` writes `hello = world` to KV
* Worker that on `GET /get` reads it back and returns it
* `wrangler.jsonc` with KV namespace binding

## Verify

```sh
curl https://<worker>.workers.dev/set
curl https://<worker>.workers.dev/get
```

## Repo

`skogai/cloudflare` — folder: `demos/kv-hello`
